basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Technical Support III / Project Research
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi)
basic_details.post_name: Project Technical Support III / Project Research Scientist I (Non-Medical)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) Project Technical Support III / Project Research Scientist I (Non-Medical) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website aiims.edu. A total of 3 vacancies for Project Technical Support III and Project Research Scientist I (Non-Medical) have been announced through the AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Age relaxation will be provided as per ICMR rules for SC/ST/OBC/PwBD candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: Three Years Graduate in relevant subject + Three Years experience or PG in relevant subject, Post Graduate Degree including the integrated PG Degree
qualification.details: Project Technical Support III: Three Years Graduate in a relevant subject plus three years of experience, OR Post Graduate (PG) in a relevant subject. Project Research Scientist I (Non-Medical): Post Graduate Degree, including the integrated PG Degree. Desirable: Experience in handling research trials. Preference will be given to PhD holders.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 21-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download AIIMS Delhi Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Delhi Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download AIIMS Delhi Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Project Technical Support III: Three Years Graduate in a relevant subject plus three years of experience, OR Post Graduate (PG) in a relevant subject. Project Research Scientist I (Non-Medical): Post Graduate Degree, including the integrated PG Degree. Desirable: Experience in handling research trials. Preference will be given to PhD holders.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Age relaxation will be provided as per ICMR rules for SC/ST/OBC/PwBD candidates.

rows.event: Last Date for Submission of Resume

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 21-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Delhi recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 21st July 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Technical Support III?
faq.answer: There are 2 vacancies available for the post of Project Technical Support III in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification for Project Research Scientist I (Non-Medical)?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Post Graduate Degree, including an integrated PG Degree. Experience in handling research trials is desirable, and PhD holders will be preferred.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the advertised posts will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q6. Can candidates from outside Delhi apply?
faq.answer: The notification specifies AIIMS Delhi as the location. While not explicitly stated, candidates should be prepared to work in New Delhi if selected.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for AIIMS Delhi recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is through email. Candidates need to send their resume and required documents to the official email address.

faq.question: Q8. Are there any age relaxations for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation will be provided as per ICMR rules for SC/ST/OBC/PwBD candidates.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: These are contractual positions, as indicated in the recruitment details.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article by clicking on the provided link.
